title: Dissent Log
description: Record of alternatives that were considered and rejected during a mission's decision process. Preserved as evidence so that future missions can revisit the path not taken.

dissents.description: At least one recorded alternative. Enforced by judgment-rules.json require_dissent_quorum.

hypothesis.description: The alternative that was not chosen.

proposed_by.description: Persona or agent that generated it (e.g., Visionary Inventor).

rejection_reason.description: Explicit reason for not adopting it.

rejection_confidence.description: How confident we are that this rejection was correct.

revisit_triggers.description: Future conditions that would justify revisiting this option.

evidence_refs.description: Links to supporting or opposing evidence.
